svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="lZSyjgpd-KABBky1gZk-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1201" dy="764" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "graph TD
 Public[Next.js Portfolio]
 Admin[Console & Manager UIs]

 Gateway[Fiber API Gateway]
 Redis[(Redis)]

 Auth[Auth Service gRPC]
 Manager[Manager Service gRPC]
 Future[Future Services...]

 AuthDB[(Auth DB)]
 ManagerDB[(Manager DB)]
 FutureDB[(Future DBs)]

 Public -- \"REST (X-API-KEY)\" --> Gateway
 Admin -- \"REST (Session Cookie)\" --> Gateway

 Gateway -- \"Rate Limits & Sessions\" --> Redis
 Gateway -- \"gRPC\" --> Auth
 Gateway -- \"gRPC\" --> Manager
 Gateway -. \"gRPC\" .-> Future

 Auth -- \"pgx\" --> AuthDB
 Manager -- \"pgx\" --> ManagerDB
 Future -. \"db drivers\" .-> FutureDB",
 "config": null
}" id="QYFIoECrq3DJ1M_chfw9-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
